api_info.description: UN Population Division Data Portal API providing access to comprehensive demographic data including population estimates, projections, fertility, mortality, and migration indicators for all countries and areas worldwide. Data sourced from World Population Prospects and other UN publications.

conversion.notes: Spec constructed from the official UN Population Data Portal Swagger documentation (v1.0 and v2.0). The API requires JWT bearer token authentication obtained via the /api/token/request endpoint. Covers 21 endpoints across data retrieval, indicators, locations, dimensions, sources, topics, metadata, and token management.
